## Part

<!-- Which part of the handbook? -->

- [ ] Part I — RAG
- [ ] Part II — Agents
- [ ] Glossary
- [ ] Case study

## Scope

<!-- What does this lesson cover? What's the core idea / the "why" a reader should leave with?
     Note explicitly what is OUT of scope so the page stays focused. -->

## Source references

<!-- Concepts, papers, docs, or prior art to draw on. General/vendor-neutral only —

## Definition of done

- [ ] RU draft written (first principles, tradeoffs, failure modes — not a feature list)
- [ ] EN translation added to the i18n tree
- [ ] Literary-edit pass done **per language, independently** (no calques)
- [ ] New terms added to the Glossary
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (both locales)
